description: The widow of the Cairene judge Avraham b. Natan confirms having received from her son-in-law everything that was owed to her from the estate of her late husband. The judge's daughter, as the only heir, had paid her mother whatever was owed her from her marriage contract or her husband's will. Dated Adar 1427 (February-March 1116 CE). (Information from Mediterranean Society, III, p. 483)
description_he: אלמנת שופט קהיראי מאשרת קבלת כספים מהעיזבון. מתוארך פברואר-מרץ 1116.
